3252340.name: Clue/Cluedo: Polar Research Station Crime Scene Bundle
3252340.description:
At the frozen ends of the Earth, a cold-blooded murder stains the ice crimson!

Take refuge from the howling blizzard and head to the Polar Research Station, a remote outpost founded and funded by the victim himself, Mr Boden “Boddy” Black.

Search for clues in the claustrophobic confines of the building and examine six new weapons exclusive to the Polar Research Station crime scene.

Did Security Chief Mustard silence Boddy with the Shovel, or did Journalist Scarlett sever ties with the Ice Axe? Did Climatologist Plum use the Harpoon Gun to hunt new prey, or did Consultant Peacock crack under Boddy’s scrutiny and reach for the Microscope?

Maybe Environmental Minister Green took Boddy’s final breath away with the Oxygen Tank, or perhaps Pilot White used the Welding Tool to seal his fate…

An all-new location, original tale and wintry cosmetics make this a must-have crime scene for any Clue/Cluedo fan!

INCLUDES:

  • A BRAND-NEW CRIME SCENE – Brave the cold and make your way to the Polar Research Station to investigate the snowy scene of the crime.

  • THEMED COSMETICS – This crime scene includes a new player avatar, a different card back, a themed clue sheet, an icy dice set and 12 new tokens.

  • MORE STORY TO EXPLORE – Learn more about the eclectic cast as they come under pressure at such a remote location…
3252340.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
